note: Thematic groups of in-scope lessons. Each cluster is the unit processed by one /loop tick. Edit freely; work-queue.md tracks status. Generated/refined by hand during Phase 0.

clusters.name: App basics & interface
clusters.description: Toolbar, panels, document orientation, screen modes, neutral color mode.

clusters.name: Preferences & auto-save
clusters.description: Preferences dialog (interface, performance, cursors, units), background auto-save.

clusters.name: Navigation: zoom & pan
clusters.description: Zoom Tool, Hand Tool, scrubby zoom, fit-on-screen, 100% view, navigation shortcuts.

clusters.name: File: open, place, new, save-as, close
clusters.description: File > Open, drag-drop, Place Embedded, New Document dialog, Save As to protect originals, Close / Close All.

clusters.name: Image size, canvas size, rotate & straighten
clusters.description: Image Size dialog (pixels/resolution, resampling, pixel art, email/web, upscale), Canvas Size, Rotate / Straighten / Ruler Tool.

clusters.name: Crop tool
clusters.description: Crop Tool basics, Classic Mode, straighten, single-layer crop, circular crop, Perspective Crop, tips & tricks.

clusters.name: Layers basics & Layers panel
clusters.description: Layers panel, layer types, Background layer behavior, panel options, shortcuts, layers learning index.

clusters.name: Layers operations
clusters.description: Stamp visible, copy layer effects, auto-select, align/distribute, layer groups, Properties panel, moving images between documents.

clusters.name: Blend modes
clusters.description: Blend mode dropdown, live preview, keyboard cycling, blending images via blend modes.

clusters.name: Layer styles, opacity & fill
clusters.description: Layer Style dialog, fx menu, Opacity vs Fill semantics, saving styles as presets.

clusters.name: Selection overview & Transform Selection
clusters.description: Why selections matter, add/subtract/intersect modifiers, Transform Selection on the marching ants.

clusters.name: Marquee tools
clusters.description: Rectangular & Elliptical Marquee, M / Shift+M, modifiers, basics.

clusters.name: Lasso tools
clusters.description: Freehand Lasso, Polygonal Lasso, Magnetic Lasso.

clusters.name: Wand, Quick, Object Selection (non-AI), Color Range
clusters.description: Content / color based selection: Magic Wand tolerance, Quick Selection paint, Object Selection rectangle/lasso (non-AI), Color Range sampled colors.

clusters.name: Pen Tool & Curvature Pen (paths for selections)
clusters.description: Pen Tool path drawing, converting paths to selections, Curvature Pen smooth-curve mode.

clusters.name: Selection refinement: Quick Mask, Feather, Refine Edge, Focus Area
clusters.description: Quick Mask preview, feather with live preview, classic Refine Edge dialog, Focus Area auto-selection.

clusters.name: Layer masks
clusters.description: Adding a mask, paint black/white, paste into mask, advanced tips, fake masks via adjustment layers, masks with layer effects, blending photos with masks + gradients.

clusters.name: Clipping masks
clusters.description: Clip to layer below, clipping masks with type for photo-in-text effects.

clusters.name: Free Transform & Warp
clusters.description: Ctrl/Cmd+T, scale/rotate/skew/distort/perspective, Warp grid (incl. enhanced 2020 warp).

clusters.name: Brush tool: basics, presets, eraser swap, Paint Symmetry
clusters.description: B key, cursor preferences, brush as eraser (Clear blend), making custom brushes (Define Brush Preset), brush presets save/load (panel), Paint Symmetry.

clusters.name: Brush dynamics tabs
clusters.description: Shape Dynamics, Scattering, Texture, Dual Brush, Color Dynamics, Other Dynamics.

clusters.name: Gradient tool, Gradient Editor, Live Gradients
clusters.description: G key, preset picker, drawing modes, Gradient Editor stops/midpoints/opacity, Live Gradients (CC 2023), rainbow recipe.

clusters.name: Color, Eyedropper & Swatches panel
clusters.description: Picking type/foreground color from image, swatches drag-drop, custom swatches, swatches from images (Mosaic).

clusters.name: Type basics
clusters.description: Type Tool point vs area type, font/size/color, Character & Paragraph panels.

clusters.name: Type advanced: on-path, warp, type-in-shape
clusters.description: Type on a Path, Warp Text presets, text shaped like a custom path, filling shape with text.

clusters.name: Shape concepts & geometric tools
clusters.description: Vector vs pixel shapes, Tool Mode (Shape/Path/Pixels), Rectangle/Ellipse/Polygon/Line/Triangle, 5-point star recipe, shape combination ops.

clusters.name: Custom Shape Tool & shape presets
clusters.description: Custom Shape Tool, Shapes panel groups, custom shape sets save/load via Preset Manager, defining custom shapes from paths.

clusters.name: Patterns
clusters.description: Define Pattern, Fill > Pattern, pattern tiles from shapes and gradients.
